Notes: Nicole Sarcone led New Paltz with a career high 16 points. Maggie Farrell
posted a double double with 12 points and 11 boards. Kristen Caban added 11
points and Artie Williams finished with 10 points all in the last six and half
minutes. Jessica Laing led Cortland with 31 points and 14 boards.
Game.Officials: Debra Archambault,  Luis Aviles,  Christine Shiely
